_fixture_note: ACTUAL output of the first live run (names/IDs kept generic where user-identifying). Historic detail: this run produced the first-ever live firing of snowflake-cost-audit's anomaly detector -- the +96.6% spike was caused by this project's own testing queries that day. Freshness staleness is true (static demo data). Used by fixture-test CI: structural assertions only.

snowflake_cost.scope_note: Totals cover user-managed warehouses only (WAREHOUSE_METERING_HISTORY). Serverless features (tasks, Snowpipe, etc.) bill separately and are not included.

issues.recommendation: Config observation, not confirmed waste -- confirm with cluster-policy owner whether the long auto-suspend is deliberate before treating it as something to fix.
